expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx implements FilterType 'all'|'unread' with two buttons and conditional filtering on lines 54-57
Fetch logic is inline in NotificationList.tsx using useEffect + fetch (lines 20-34), not extracted to a separate hook file
No custom hook was extracted, so no use{Verb}{Resource} pattern applies
Lines 46-52: error check with data-testid='notifications-error' returns early before filter UI
Filter handlers are inline arrow functions: onClick={() => setFilter('all')} — no handle-prefixed function names
Spec file is in outputs/ as dashboard-notification-filter.spec.ts, not under features/next-app/tests/
